source: Hand-curated landmarks for the BLM Grazing Allotments by State sightline.

properties.name: Bunkerville & Gold Butte
properties.blurb: Cliven Bundy's allotments sit in a checkerboard with Gold Butte National Monument (2016) and the desert-tortoise critical-habitat area whose protection underpinned the 1993 permit non-renewal that began the Bundy standoff.

properties.name: Owyhee Canyonlands
properties.blurb: Complex mosaic of wilderness, wilderness study areas, and grazing permits straddling the Idaho / Oregon border. A persistent legal battleground.

properties.name: Harney County
properties.blurb: The 2016 Malheur NWR occupation occurred adjacent to these allotments, next to the Hammond family's Steens Mountain allotment.

properties.name: Grand Staircase-Escalante
properties.blurb: The monument redesignations (1996 / 2017 / 2021) directly affected allotment management across southern Utah.
